top_signals.title: Koeda says BOJ should keep hiking rate at appropriate pace
top_signals.summary: Koeda was among those who voted with the majority in favor of holding settings steady at the last policy meeting on April 28.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Australia Jobless Rate Jumps to 4-1/2 Year High as RBA Bets Fade
top_signals.summary: Australia’s unemployment rate climbed to the highest level since November 2021, suggesting the labor market is cooling faster than anticipated and prompting traders to dial back expectations for further interest-rate increases.
